description: ATA Blog WordPress and Notion wrapper

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to activate within its auth type

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

arguments.name: identifier
arguments.help: Post ID or slug to get earnings for

options.name: --period
options.help: Time period: yesterday, last7d, last30d, mtd, lastmonth

options.name: --period
options.help: Time period: yesterday, last7d, last30d, mtd, lastmonth

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

options.name: --file
options.help: Markdown file to set as content

options.name: --status
options.help: Override default status (template sets 'Idea' by default)

options.name: --template-id
options.help: Notion template ID (defaults to Standard ATA Tutorial AI-Created Idea)

options.name: --slug
options.help: Custom URL slug (auto-generated if not provided)

options.name: --featured-image
options.help: Path to featured image file to upload and attach

options.name: --force
options.help: Force republish even if already published

options.name: --type
options.help: Property type. Supported (empty-config types only): rich_text, url, checkbox, number, date, email, phone_number, files. (select/multi_select require options and are out of scope for this command.)

options.name: --proficiency
options.help: [Beginner|Intermediate|Expert]  Proficiency level for TechArticle (Beginner, Intermediate, Expert)

options.name: --item
options.help: Name of item being reviewed for Review schema

options.name: --position
options.help: Position of the shoutout to get

options.name: --position
options.help: Position of the shoutout to remove

options.name: --filter
options.help: Forwarded filter expressions for wordpress admin

options.name: --status
options.help: Page status (publish, draft, pending, private, future)

options.name: --from-docx
options.help: Path to DOCX file to convert

options.name: --from-markdown
options.help: Path to Markdown file to convert

options.name: --status
options.help: Post status (publish, draft, pending, private, future)

options.name: --from-docx
options.help: Path to DOCX file to convert

options.name: --from-markdown
options.help: Path to Markdown file to convert

options.name: --sponsored
options.help: Sponsored post (nofollow links, Sponsored tag, disable ads)

options.name: --include-ads
options.help: Live-scan the post URL for advertisers via Google Publisher Tag (adds 'ads' key). JSON only -- incompatible with --table

options.name: --include-ads
options.help: Live-scan each post URL for advertisers via Google Publisher Tag (adds 'ads' key per item). JSON only -- incompatible with --table
